title: D&D 2024 Weapons
description: Schema for data/equipment/weapons.json. Top-level keys are weapon names; values describe stats. Properties is an open string list (Light, Heavy, Reach, Finesse, Versatile (1dN), Thrown (range A/B), Ammunition (range A/B), Loading, Two-Handed, etc.). Mastery is optional because a handful of weapons (e.g. Dart) intentionally do not carry one.

damage_type.description: Standard damage type, plus the literal 'Special' used by the Net (which deals no damage; see PHB 2024). TODO(data-completeness): consider modelling Net as a non-damaging utility weapon rather than using a 'Special' damage_type sentinel.
